hero.headline: Chinese cooking, honestly made.
hero.subheadline: A neighbourhood table in Kraainem — where tradition meets the quiet pleasure of a well-made dish.

about.title: Our Table
about.body:
Lotus has been a fixture of Kraainem's dining landscape for decades. What began as a modest Chinese kitchen has matured into something rarer — a restaurant where the recipes stay close to their origins and the welcome feels unhurried.

The kitchen works with a vocabulary rooted in Cantonese and Northern Chinese traditions: hand-folded dumplings, roast duck carved to order, and wok dishes built on a foundation of fresh aromatics and honest heat. More recently, a full range of vegan and vegetarian dishes has joined the menu — not as an afterthought, but as a genuine extension of the kitchen's craft.

We close on Mondays and Tuesday midday. A kitchen that rests cooks better when it returns.

menu.description: Clear broths, silken textures, and the kind of warmth that settles you into the meal ahead.

items.name: Oriental Pepper Soup
items.subtitle: Oosterse pepersoep
items.description: A light, aromatic broth lifted by a clean, lingering heat.

items.subtitle: Zwaluwnestjessoep

items.description: Plump pork-filled dumplings in a fragrant, ginger-kissed broth.

items.name: Sui Gao Soup
items.subtitle: Sui-Gao soep

items.name: Chicken Soup with Bamboo & Mushrooms

items.name: Chicken Spring Rolls

items.name: Roast Duck with Curry Sauce

menu.description: The dishes we are most proud of. Sizzling Ti-Pan platters, imperial ribs, and the kitchen's greatest hits.

items.subtitle: Ribbetjes op keizerlijke wijze

items.subtitle: Rundvlees op Ti-Pan
items.description: Seared beef served sizzling on a cast-iron platter — dramatic and delicious.

items.subtitle: Kippenreepjes op Ti-Pan
items.description: Chicken sizzling on the hot plate with wok-charred vegetables.

items.subtitle: Scampis op Ti-Pan
items.description: Plump scampi arriving at the table on a sizzling, smoking platter.

items.name: Frog's Legs with Spices

items.description: Delicate frog's legs perfumed with a fragrant blend of spices.

items.name: Grilled Spare Ribs with Garlic
items.subtitle: Gegrilde ribbetjes met look

items.name: Chinese Family Dish (Slightly Spicy)

items.name: Eight Delicacies (Slightly Spicy)

footer_tagline: Lotus — Kraainem's Chinese table since day one.
